---
title: "zbtb20_wtvko_promoters_edger"
author: "G Sejourne"
date: "2026-02-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("vidger")
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:


```{r}
library(dplyr)

#read in P28 snRNAseq data
res_rna <- read.csv("./data/neun_neg_Wilcoxon_results_260120.csv")

rownames(res_rna) <- res_rna$KO_n
res_rna <- subset(res_rna, select = c(KO_l, KO_p) )
colnames(res_rna) = c('logFC_rna', 'pval_rna')

res_rna$gene <- rownames(res_rna)
```

```{r}
# annotate genes as CpG islands
library(dplyr)
cpg_clustered <- read.table("union_cpg.bed", sep = "\t")
 
cpg_promoters <- cpg_clustered[c(4)]
head(cpg_promoters)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
wt.gene.list <- read.csv('wt.gene.list.csv')
wt.gene.list <- wt.gene.list[,2]
ko.gene.list <- read.csv('ko.gene.list.csv')
ko.gene.list <- ko.gene.list[,2]
intersect.gene.list <- read.csv('intersect.gene.list.csv')
intersect.gene.list <- intersect.gene.list[,2]

res_combined <- res_rna %>%
  mutate(
    sig_rna     = pval_rna < 0.05 & abs(abs(logFC_rna) > 0.3219),

    peakset = case_when(
      gene %in% wt.gene.list ~ 'wt_unique',
      gene %in% ko.gene.list ~ 'ko_unique',
      gene %in% intersect.gene.list ~ 'intersect'
    ),
    cpg = gene %in% cpg_promoters$V4,
    
    color_group = ifelse(sig_rna, as.character(peakset), "Not_sig")
  )

write.csv(res_combined, './data/cutrun_rnaseq_res_combined.csv')

```

```{r}
library(ggrepel)
plot_data <- res_combined[!is.na(res_combined$peakset),]
plot_data <- plot_data[order(rownames(plot_data)), ]

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = logFC_rna, y = -log(pval_rna, 10))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +

  geom_point(
    aes(color = color_group, alpha = sig_rna),
    size = 2
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "intersect" = "purple",
    "ko_unique" = "firebrick1",
    "wt_unique" = "dodgerblue",
    "Not_sig"  = "gray70"
  )) +

  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = 1, `FALSE` = 0.3)) +

  labs(
    x = "RNA-seq log2FC (KO vs WT)",
    y = "RNA-seq -log10pVal (KO vs WT)",
    color = "Direction",
    title = "mRNA expression of Zbtb20 target genes (P28 NeuN- nuclei)"
  ) +
  xlim(-1, 1.5) +
  #ylim(0, 130) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = plot_data %>% filter(gene %in% c("Zbtb20", "Maml2", "Tcf4", "Zeb1", "Zmiz1", "Nfia", "Grin2b", "Camk2a", "Dlg2", "Ctnnb1", "Ptprd", "Celf2", "Rbfox1", "Zbtb7c", "Pbx1", "Pou3f2", "Pou2f1")),
    #max.overlaps = 100,
    aes(label = gene),
    min.segment.length = 0,
    size = 6,
    #fontface = "bold",
    box.padding = 0.5,
    #fill = "white"
  )

ggsave('./edger_plots/p28snrnaseq_FCvsPval_sigrna.png')

```
